tool.name: OGS: GocadSGridReader
tool.description: Galaxy wrapper for the OGS utility 'GocadSGridReader'.
tool.command: mkdir inputs; # Verzeichnis für saubere Trennung #for $m in $sg: ln -s "$m" "inputs/${m.element_identifier}"; #end for gocadsgridreader $generate_face_sets #for $m in $sg: --sg "inputs/${m.element_identifier}" #end for --output-mesh output_1.vtu
tool.help: This tool runs the **GocadSGridReader** utility from the OpenGeoSys suite.
